pageSubtitle: Manage RabbitMQ virtual hosts and namespace isolation
noServerDescription: Add a RabbitMQ server connection to manage virtual hosts and namespace isolation.
selectServerPrompt: Please select a RabbitMQ server to manage virtual hosts.
accessDenied: Access denied. Virtual host management is only available to administrators.
title: Virtual Hosts
name: Name
permissionsColTooltip: Users with explicit permissions on this vhost
protectedTooltip: This vhost is protected from deletion
noPermissions: No permissions set for this virtual host
cannotDeleteDefault: Cannot delete the default virtual host
requiredFields: Please fill in all permission fields
setLimitsError: Please set at least one limit
selectServer: Please select a server to view virtual host details.
failedToLoad: Failed to load virtual host details
editVhostDescription: Update the configuration for {{name}} virtual host.
descriptionPlaceholder: Description of the virtual host purpose
defaultQueueTypeDescription: Default type for queues created in this virtual host
enableTracingDescription: Enable message tracing for this virtual host
enableTracingWarning: Tracing routes every message through a system exchange. This can significantly impact broker throughput on busy vhosts.
createVhostDescription: Create a new virtual host for logical isolation of resources.
nameDescription: Unique name for the virtual host
emptyFilterState: No virtual hosts match this filter
noVhostsDescription: Add your first virtual host to isolate RabbitMQ resources by environment or application.
thresholdUsingDefault: Using workspace default — warning when unacked > {{default}}
clearPermissionsDescription: This will remove all permissions for {{user}} on this virtual host. This action cannot be undone.
regexHint: .* = full access · ^$ = deny all · ^amq\. = default exchanges
configureRegexpTooltip: Queues and exchanges this user can create, delete, or reconfigure
writeRegexpTooltip: Exchanges this user can publish messages to
readRegexpTooltip: Queues this user can consume messages from
deleteVhostDescription: Permanently delete this virtual host and all its queues, exchanges, and data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteVhostDialogDescription: This will permanently delete the virtual host {{name}} and all its queues, exchanges, and data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteVhostConfirmLabel: Type the virtual host name to confirm
queueTypeServerDefaultDesc: Inherit whatever the broker is configured for.
queueTypeQuorumDesc: Replicated, durable. Recommended for most workloads.
queueTypeClassicDesc: Single-node, legacy. Lower overhead, no replication.
previewTemplateVHost: Creates a virtual host named {{name}} with {{queueType}} as the default queue type.
previewTemplateVHostWithTracing: Creates a {{adjectives}} virtual host named {{name}} with {{queueType}} as the default queue type.

toast.alreadyExistsDesc: A virtual host named "{{name}}" already exists on this server.
toast.serverErrorDesc: The selected RabbitMQ server could not be reached.
